steps.t: You should investigate Caras Tilion, which can be found in the mountains at the southern edge of Eryn Lasgalen.
Caras Tilion can be found in the mountains at the southern edge of Eryn Lasgalen. You should investigate Caras Tilion and defeat any of the darkness w…
Having explored and dealt with the shadows, you should reconvene with Oroniel in Caras Tilion.
You should go quickly to Oroniel, where she called out for aid in Caras Tilion.
